section_miscategorizations.text: Advise patient to continue taking ibuprofen as needed.
section_miscategorizations.reason: As written, this implies the patient is already taking ibuprofen and is being advised to continue, mixing current medication state with a treatment plan. Current medications belong in S unless clearly framed as a new or modified order; here it is ambiguous and could mislead a reader about whether this is history vs. a new directive.
